description: GeoClaw reduced-mode South Fork high-flow cascading stitched whole-window profile closure for Milestone 18.

source.notes: Derived from stitched whole-window normalized GeoClaw h/u/v fields for the South Fork American high-runnable cascading row; used only as bounded reduced calibration with feature forcing disabled, reduced profile fast path enabled, initial-mass preservation disabled, and seam-visible stitched validation outputs.
